issue.title: Bug: Terminal bottom row (prompt) renders below the viewport until a keystroke — output path never re-syncs scroll

successCriteria.description: With a full terminal at the prompt, the bottom row stays visible after output settles without a keystroke
Scrolling up to read history during active output does NOT auto-jump to the bottom
Resize, font-size change, split panes, and tab switches keep the bottom row visible
The extracted viewport-sync helper has a unit test; desktop vitest suite and pnpm build stay green

phases.title: Pin to bottom after output (the core fix)
phases.summary: Added pure isViewportAtBottom() in viewportSync.ts; handleOutput now captures atBottom before write and re-pins via the write callback only when already at bottom (preserves scroll-up-to-read).
phases.content: Extract a pure helper isViewportAtBottom(viewportY, baseY) into a new apps/desktop/src/components/terminal/viewportSync.ts. In Terminal.tsx handleOutput, capture atBottom = isViewportAtBottom(buffer.active.viewportY, buffer.active.baseY) BEFORE writing, then use the write callback form: xterm.write(data, () => { if (atBottom) xterm.scrollToBottom(); }). This mirrors xterm's scrollOnUserInput behavior (why a keystroke fixes it) and preserves scroll-up-to-read because it only re-pins when the user is already at the bottom.
verification: handleOutput captures atBottom before write and re-pins only when atBottom
isViewportAtBottom is a pure, exported function
no scroll jump occurs when the user has scrolled up (atBottom false)

phases.title: Harden resize/fit paths
phases.summary: Added stable fitAndSync() (fit → scrollToBottom → refresh); RAF-debounced the ResizeObserver and routed init + font-size shortcuts through it; removed the redundant window-resize listener (also fixed its cleanup leak).
phases.content: Add a fitAndSync() helper in Terminal.tsx that runs fitAddon.fit() then xterm.scrollToBottom() and xterm.refresh(0, xterm.rows - 1) (guarded on dimensions). Route the ResizeObserver, window-resize, initial mount, and font-size (Ctrl +/-/0) paths through it. Debounce the ResizeObserver via requestAnimationFrame (cancel a pending frame before scheduling a new one) and drop the redundant double-fit (the window-resize listener fires the same ResizeObserver, so consolidate). This covers the resize-stale-render variant and the Math.floor(rows) sub-cell residue that makes it intermittent.
verification: all fit() call sites route through fitAndSync()
ResizeObserver fit is RAF-debounced (no synchronous fit storm)
font-size shortcuts still reflow and keep the bottom visible

phases.title: Unit test the helper + run the gates
phases.summary: Added viewportSync.test.ts (3 cases). Desktop vitest 187/187 green; pnpm build (tsc -b + vite) clean.
phases.content: Add apps/desktop/src/components/terminal/__tests__/viewportSync.test.ts asserting isViewportAtBottom returns true at/over baseY and false when scrolled up. Run the full desktop vitest suite and pnpm build (tsc -b) as the regression gate.
